D1 OpticsL3 ApplyReference

Fringe Visibility vs Coherence Time — Laser, LED, Sunlight

Coherence length L_c = c·τ_c ≈ c·λ²/Δλ; HeNe laser ~30 cm, LED ~30 µm, sunlight ~1 µm — fringes disappear when arm imbalance exceeds L_c

Three classic sources at 600 nm: HeNe laser Δλ ≈ 0.001 nm → L_c ~36 cm; red LED Δλ ≈ 12 nm → L_c ~30 µm; sunlight Δλ ≈ 350 nm → L_c ~1 µm. Visibility V = sinc(πΔ/L_c) for rectangular spectrum.

Toggle source + slide path-difference Δ.
